creator: c0rn@o2.pl
text:
I own HP Compaq nx6125 laptop, when I turn on powerd by adding
powerd_enable="YES" to my rc.conf it hangs within 15 min of working 
even when laptop idles. After that I can only reboot machine.

Here's my dmesg output:
